/usr/bin/ar qc libSimpleWalletLib.a CMakeFiles/SimpleWalletLib.dir/SimpleWallet/ClientHelper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWalletLib.dir/SimpleWallet/PasswordContainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWalletLib.dir/SimpleWallet/SimpleWallet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWalletLib.dir/SimpleWallet/TransferCmd.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWalletLib.dir/SimpleWallet/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWalletLib.dir/SwapDaemon/AdaptorSwap.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SimpleWalletLib.dir/SwapDaemon/SwapTypes.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libSimpleWalletLib.a
